signals.raw:
I cannot identify breaking news from these search results that would move prediction markets today (April 22, 2026). The search results contain information from early April 2026—specifically the **IMF's April 2, 2026 Article IV Consultation conclusion and related commentary**—but nothing dated April 22 or later.

The most recent developments in these results are:

signals.headline: IMF Rate Cut Forecast (April 2, 2026):** The IMF stated there is **"little room to cut interest rates in 2026,"** with t
signals.raw: IMF Rate Cut Forecast (April 2, 2026):** The IMF stated there is **"little room to cut interest rates in 2026,"** with the fed funds rate projected to fall only from 3.6% to 3.4%—essentially one cut for the entire year.[1] Core PCE inflation was projected at 2.6% by end-2026, not reaching the 2% target until early 2027.[1]

signals.headline: Powell's Economic Assessment (December 2025):** Powell characterized the economy as **"very unusual"** due to tariff-dri
signals.raw: Powell's Economic Assessment (December 2025):** Powell characterized the economy as **"very unusual"** due to tariff-driven goods inflation coexisting with labor market weakness, though he expected goods inflation to peak around Q1 2026.[3]
